---
title: "apply_affine"
generated: true
description: "Apply a homogeneous transform to a field of coordinates."
---

[‹ back to `nitrix.geometry.transform`](../nitrix-geometry-transform.qmd)

<!-- nitrix:gen sig:apply_affine -->
```python
apply_affine(coords: Float[Array, '... d'], matrix: Float[Array, 'd1 d1'], *, center: Optional[Float[Array, 'd']] = None) -> Float[Array, '... d']
```
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->

<!-- nitrix:gen overview:apply_affine -->
Apply a homogeneous transform to a field of coordinates.

Computes $\mathrm{out} = M (p - c) + t + c$ for the linear
block $M$ and translation $t$ of `matrix`, with optional
rotation/scaling centre $c$.
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->

<!-- nitrix:gen params:apply_affine -->
**Parameters**

| parameter | type | shape | default | description |
|------------|--------|--------|----------|--------------------------------------------------------------|
| `coords` | `Float` | `...` × `d` | — | `(..., ndim)` field of input coordinates in index space. |
| `matrix` | `Float` | `d1` × `d1` | — | `(ndim + 1, ndim + 1)` homogeneous transform matrix. |
| `center` | `Optional[Float[Array, 'd']]` | — | `None` | Optional `(ndim,)` rotation/scaling centre $c$. `None` (default) uses the origin. |

**Returns** `Float` — shape `...` × `d`. The transformed coordinates, `(..., ndim)`.
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->


<!-- nitrix:gen dims:apply_affine -->
**Tensor dimensions**

| dim | meaning |
|---|---|
| `...` | anonymous leading (batch) axes |
| `d` | spatial dimension (2 or 3) |
| `d1` | *(undocumented — add to `_dimensions.yml`)* |
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->
